title: Breaking Animations
description: Simple, and easy to understand. I think it works for all versions (well, at least  1.16.5+) :PPP
body:
### Very useful resource pack, it should work well in all versions but maybe 1.16.5+
If you see an "uncompatible for this version" (or smth like that) message it doesn't matter.

_Resourcepack showcase:_
![Resource Pack Showcase!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b440b13747012ba97848fbdcdd7d012afaf1d86.gif)

**You can see all breaking stages from the pack in the gallery tab!**
